title: 001199 with n_ens24 for both RealMLP seeds
summary: Use an intermediate n_ens=24 for both RealMLP seeds in 001199.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only the RealMLP n_ens value from 20 to 24 for both seeds. Keep CatBoost correction, folds, features, and outputs unchanged.
expected_effect: Find a lower-cost sweet spot between n_ens20 and n_ens32.
risk: The change may be too small to exceed noise.
